description.value: > Whimsy You find the humor in all things, and enjoy spreading laughter through pranks and trickery, even in the direst of situations. Associated Domain: Chaos. Replacement Power: The following granted power replaces the chaos blade of the Chaos domain. Unexpected Whimsy (Su) As a standard action, you dance, act like a buffoon, or commit some other act of whimsy. When you do, enemies within 30 feet of you that can see and hear you must succeed a Will saving throw (DC = 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + half your Wisdom modifier) or they collapse into gales of manic laughter, falling prone. Those who fail their saving throws can take no actions other than laughing for 1 round, but are not considered helpless. You can use this ability once per day at 8th level and one additional time for every 4 levels you possess beyond 8th. Replacement Domain Spells: 1stâ hideous laughter, 4thâ confusion, 6thâ cloak of dreams.
